start.greeting:
Hi {name}.
Thank you very much for choosing "DailyPlannerBot" as your task manager.
Let me check if you've missed out any appointment while the server was down.
start.checking_missed: Ops, while the server was down you missed those events:

help.command_list: Those are the command i support:

unsupported.unknown_command:
You wrote: {command}.
I don't know any command with that name.
Please consult /help for a list with all supported commands.
unsupported.plain_text:
I am a simple bot, i can't yet understand natural language.
Please use a pre-defined command to interact with me. For a complete list use /help.
unsupported.photo: Something went wrong, maybe it's because i have no eyes to see images ...
unsupported.voice: Really? do you think i can get that?.
unsupported.video: So much bytes for wasted for something i can't process...
unsupported.document: Really, really clever... now try to resume it in a few words and i'll be sure to not answer.
unsupported.location: Nice, go there first, i'll reach you when i'll be able to walk
unsupported.contact: No thanks, i have already a partner
